reported_entities.name: Naturehike (official website)
reported_entities.claim: Primary official Naturehike website (founded 2010), sells full product catalog of camping/hiking gear.

reported_entities.name: Naturehike Contact Us page
reported_entities.claim: General customer service email support@naturehike.com; office hours 8:30am-5:30pm GMT+8 Mon-Fri; contact form available.

reported_entities.name: Naturehike Wholesale page
reported_entities.claim: Dedicated wholesale/bulk purchase contact page. US bulk inquiries: support@naturehike.com. International/China HQ wholesale contact: Miss Helen, helen@naturehike.com, phone 86-15990241150, address No. 55 Chuangfu Road, Xiaogang Street, Beilun District, Ningbo City, Zhejiang Province, hours Mon-Fri 5:30PM-2:30AM PST. Also lists regional official distributors (e.g. Australia: Naturexplore Outdoors; Argentina: Naka Outdoors; Poland: Skalnik; Malaysia: Sirius Outdoor/CampGuru; plus Brazil, Indonesia, Philippines, Mongolia).

notes: Search went smoothly; found official site plus a dedicated wholesale contact page on the first few queries, with clear overseas (Helen, helen@naturehike.com) and US (support@naturehike.com) wholesale contacts.
